title: More Displaced Lebanese Head Home as Cease-Fire Is Tested

title: Remains Linked to Submerged Car Solve 1958 Mystery of Missing Oregon Family
summary: The case of the missing Martin family was unsolved until a diver found a car in an Oregon river in 2024. Officials, relying on DNA tests, said Thursday that they had identified the remains of three people.
